D1 Optics L3 Apply Reference

Single- and Double-Slit Fraunhofer Pattern

watch the broad sinc-squared envelope modulate the fine double-slit fringes

A slit of width a gives a sinc² envelope; spacing d between two slits adds cos² fringes inside it. The envelope sets which interference orders survive.

Toggle one or two slits, then tune width a, separation d, and wavelength. The dashed line is the single-slit envelope; the solid curve is the full intensity.
